products.name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.shortDescription: Over-ear headphones with adaptive noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.
products.description: Immerse yourself with adaptive noise cancellation that adjusts to your environment in real time. A 30-hour battery, plush memory-foam ear cushions, and multipoint Bluetooth pairing make these an easy daily driver for commutes, calls, and focus sessions alike.

products.name: Smart Fitness Watch
products.shortDescription: Track workouts, sleep, and heart rate with a 10-day battery.
products.description: A lightweight fitness watch that tracks over 20 workout modes, sleep stages, and continuous heart rate — all on a battery that lasts up to 10 days per charge. Water-resistant to 50m so it keeps up in the pool too.

products.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.shortDescription: Pocket-sized speaker with 12-hour playtime and IPX7 waterproofing.
products.description: Don't let the size fool you — this speaker fills a room with balanced, punchy sound and holds up to 12 hours on a single charge. IPX7-rated, so poolside splashes and light rain are no problem.

products.name: Compact Mechanical Keyboard
products.shortDescription: 75% layout mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches.
products.description: A space-saving 75% layout without sacrificing the arrow keys or function row. Hot-swappable switches mean you can tune the feel without a soldering iron, and the aluminum top plate keeps the whole board sturdy.

products.name: 4K Webcam with Auto-Frame
products.shortDescription: Crisp 4K video with auto-framing and a built-in privacy shutter.
products.description: Sharp 4K video, automatic framing that keeps you centered as you move, and a physical privacy shutter for peace of mind when the camera's off duty.

products.name: 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Pad
products.shortDescription: Charge your phone, watch, and earbuds at once.
products.description: One pad, three charging spots — phone, smartwatch, and earbuds all topped up overnight without a tangle of cables on your nightstand.

products.name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
products.shortDescription: Hand-glazed ceramic dripper with matching carafe.
products.description: A slow-poured cup, made simple. The hand-glazed dripper sits snugly on the matching 600ml carafe, and the double-wall design keeps your coffee hotter for longer.

products.name: Washed Linen Throw Blanket
products.shortDescription: Breathable, pre-washed linen that softens with every wash.
products.description: Stonewashed for softness right out of the bag, this linen throw breathes in summer and layers well in winter. Machine washable, and it only gets better with age.

products.name: 10-Inch Cast Iron Skillet
products.shortDescription: Pre-seasoned skillet built to last generations.
products.description: Pre-seasoned and ready to cook from day one, this skillet goes from stovetop to oven to table. With proper care, it's the kind of pan you hand down.

products.name: Rattan Pendant Light Shade
products.shortDescription: Hand-woven rattan shade that casts warm, dappled light.
products.description: Hand-woven from natural rattan, this pendant shade filters light into a warm, dappled glow — a simple way to add texture to any room without a full rewire.

products.name: Stoneware Dinnerware Set (16-Piece)
products.shortDescription: Service for four — dinner plates, side plates, bowls, and mugs.
products.description: A complete service for four with a soft matte glaze that hides everyday scratches. Dishwasher, microwave, and oven safe up to 450°F.

products.name: Ultrasonic Aroma Diffuser
products.shortDescription: Whisper-quiet mist with seven ambient light settings.
products.description: A whisper-quiet ultrasonic diffuser that runs up to 8 hours per fill, with seven soft light settings for a calmer evening wind-down.

products.name: Organic Cotton Crewneck Tee
products.shortDescription: Heavyweight organic cotton with a relaxed fit.
products.description: A heavyweight organic cotton tee with a relaxed, not-baggy fit. Garment-dyed for a slightly worn-in look straight out of the bag, and it holds its shape wash after wash.

products.name: Heavy Canvas Tote Bag
products.shortDescription: 12oz canvas tote built for daily hauling.
products.description: Built from 12oz canvas with reinforced stitching at every stress point, this tote is made for the daily grind — groceries, laptops, gym clothes, all of it.

products.name: Wool-Blend Scarf
products.shortDescription: Soft wool-blend weave in classic plaid.
products.description: A soft wool-blend weave in a classic plaid, long enough to wrap twice and warm enough for anything short of a blizzard.

products.name: Leather Minimalist Wallet
products.shortDescription: Full-grain leather, slim enough for a front pocket.
products.description: Full-grain leather that develops a rich patina over time, cut slim enough to disappear in a front pocket while still holding four cards and folded bills.

products.name: Canvas Low-Top Sneakers
products.shortDescription: Classic canvas sneaker with a cushioned insole.
products.description: A classic canvas low-top with a cushioned insole and a vulcanized rubber sole built to handle actual walking, not just standing around looking good.

products.name: Structured Baseball Cap
products.shortDescription: Structured six-panel cap with an adjustable strap.
products.description: A structured six-panel cap that holds its shape, with an adjustable strap in back for a sizing that actually fits.
